DESCRIPTION: Verifies that Deal of the Day page opens successfully.
NAME: Positive - Open Deal of the Day

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that a product can be selected from Deal of the Day list.
NAME: Positive - Select Product from Deal List

DESCRIPTION: Verifies a product can be added to cart from Deal of the Day.
NAME: Positive - Add Product Successfully

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that checkout page opens after adding product to cart.
NAME: Positive - Proceed to Checkout

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that an empty cart is correctly detected at checkout.
NAME: Negative - Checkout Without Product

DESCRIPTION: Selects a Deal of the Day product, adds to cart, proceeds to checkout, and enters email.
NAME: End to End - Add Product and Proceed to Checkout

DESCRIPTION: Verifies that an invalid email shows a validation error at checkout.
NAME: Negative - Invalid Email at Checkout
